analysis: The current project files for the black holes theme are incomplete. The HTML file lacks sections and interactive elements related to black holes. The CSS file is missing the full dark, cosmic theme with animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The JavaScript file has syntax errors and incomplete functionality. The project needs a cohesive UI theme focused on black holes with animated slides and pages.

improvements.description: Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the CSS file includes all necessary styles for the black hole theme, animations, and interactive elements.

Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in test-website/index.html.
